---
title: "Demo RplotterPkg::create_table()"
author: "Rick Dean"
date: "1/17/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(RplotterPkg)
library(data.table)
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
df <- mtcars[1:5, 1:6]
new_table <- RplotterPkg::create_table(
  x = df
)
new_table
```
```{r}
dt <- data.table::as.data.table(mtcars)
dt[, cars := rownames(mtcars)]
setcolorder(dt,neworder = "cars")
new_table <- RplotterPkg::create_table(
  x = dt,
  font_size = 20,
  caption = "Car mpg",
  position = "left",
  fixed_thead = T,
  head_bkgd = "purple",
  head_col = "white",
  footnote = "mtcars",
  footnote_title = "Source:",
  scroll_height = "200px"
)
new_table
```
